results.title: Mumbai: Photo Of Man Sleeping On Moving Metro In Aqua Line Sparks Civic Sense Debate
results.description: A photo showing a man sleeping across four seats inside Mumbai Metro 3 Aqua Line has sparked discussion online about civic sense and commuter behaviour. While the coach appeared relatively empty, many questioned whether occupying multiple seats in a shared public space should be normalised in the city’s newest metro service.

results.title: England's Bazball reset begins with 115-run win over New Zealand early on Day 4 at Lord's
results.description: LONDON (AP) — England wrapped up a 115-run victory over New Zealand before lunch on Day 4 of the first cricket test at Lord’s on Sunday, marking a positive start to its “Bazball” reset after the Ashes humiliation Down Under.
